indicators.name: no stove or oven
indicators.rationale: No cooking appliances are visible, which are essential for daily cooking.

indicators.name: no sink
indicators.rationale: No water source is available for food preparation and cleaning.

indicators.name: no hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertops or hard washable work surfaces are present for food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: no storage space
indicators.rationale: No cabinets or shelves are visible for storing ingredients and cookware.

indicators.name: no ventilation system
indicators.rationale: No visible ventilation system to remove cooking odors and smoke.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for daily cooking due to the absence of essential cooking appliances, water access, and storage space. The lack of hard prep surfaces and ventilation further undermines its suitability for cooking activities.
